message:
Fix theme toggle visibility, light mode contrast, remove debug logs (#4883)

- Fix theme toggle icon invisible in light mode after refresh by using
  text-amber-600 instead of text-yellow-400 for the Sun icon, which has
  sufficient contrast against the white navbar background (#4874)

- Improve light mode visual hierarchy: offset card/background colors,
  darken borders (83% vs 91% lightness), deepen muted-foreground for
  readable secondary text, add visible border to glass components, and
  strengthen card shadows for proper elevation (#4880)

- Update KubeStellar Light theme in themes.ts to match the improved
  CSS custom properties so JS-applied and CSS-fallback values stay
  in sync (#4880)

- Remove 3 debug console.log statements from test files:
  ui-ux-standards, no-magic-numbers, concurrent-mutation-safety (#4878)

Fixes #4874, #4878, #4880

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
